title: Bitcoin Miner Marathon Digital Reports Q3 Profitability
text: Marathon Digital Holdings reported Q3 2025 results, delivering a significant turnaround from losses to profitability. The company swung from a $124.8 million loss a year ago to $123.1 million in net income. Revenue reached $252.4 million, up 92% year-over-year, but fell short of consensus estimates by $3.3 million. At $0.27 per share, earnings trailed expectations by 40%. Bitcoin's price appreciation fueled most of the revenue growth. The company mined 2,144 BTC in Q3 and won 5% more blocks than the prior year, but management credited the 88% increase in average Bitcoin prices as the primary revenue driver rather than mining expansion. Marathon held 52,850 BTC valued at approximately $5.6 billion. Adjusted EBITDA surged to $395.6 million from $22.3 million. Despite the profitability turnaround, shares fell 5.9% to close at $16.36 reflecting investor concerns about earnings quality and sustainability.
